title: Mundaka Upanishad II: The Bow of Meditation
description: From the Mundaka Upanishad II — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Mundaka Upanishad II — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: Take the great weapon of the Upanishads as the bow. Place upon it the arrow sharpened by meditation. Drawing it back with a mind concentrated on Brahman, hit, my dear, the imperishable as the mark.
